activities.name: Fly New York (JFK) → Lisbon (LIS)
activities.notes: Overnight flight (TAP TP 210).

activities.name: Arrive Lisbon (LIS)
activities.notes: Customs + bags + SIM/ATM can take 30–75 min.

activities.name: Transit to lodging + drop bags
activities.notes: Aim to avoid packing too much into arrival day.

activities.name: Lunch (easy, nearby)
activities.notes: Keep it simple; hydrate and get outside.

activities.name: Jetlag reset: nap / shower / light stroll
activities.notes: Best practice: 60–90 min max nap, then sunlight.

activities.name: Dinner (reservation-friendly)
activities.notes: If you’re wiped, do a casual spot and call it early.

activities.name: Breakfast
activities.notes: Keep it light; lots of walking today.

activities.name: Travel to São Jorge Castle gate
activities.notes: Uber/taxi or tram + short uphill walk. Arrive ~15–20 min before entry.

activities.name: São Jorge Castle + viewpoints
activities.notes: Plan ~1.5–2h. Buy tickets online to reduce queueing.

activities.name: Miradouro / Largo Santa Luzia
activities.notes: Quick stop for tiles + views (15–30 min).

activities.name: Museu de Artes Decorativas Portuguesas
activities.notes: Largo das Portas do Sol. Aim ~45–75 min.

activities.name: Explore Alfama + lunch
activities.notes: Wander downhill through Alfama; choose a lunch spot on the way.

activities.name: Baixa walking tour (Rossio → Comércio)
activities.notes: 2–3h at a relaxed pace. Optional: Elevador de Santa Justa if lines are manageable.

activities.name: Break / chill at lodging
activities.notes: Reset, shower, short rest.

activities.name: Dinner
activities.notes: Consider booking for popular spots.

activities.name: Travel to Gulbenkian area
activities.notes: Metro/taxi ~20–30 min depending on where you stay.

activities.name: Gulbenkian (museum + gardens)
activities.notes: Plan ~1.5–2h. Note: verify museum/gallery openings for May 2026 (some spaces may be closed for renovation).

activities.name: Travel to Parque das Nações
activities.notes: Metro/taxi ~25–40 min.

activities.name: Lunch at Parque das Nações
activities.notes: Grab something along the riverfront or by the mall area.

activities.name: Parque das Nações (river walk + Telecabine)
activities.notes: Easy afternoon. Cable car + riverside stroll ~1.5–2h.

activities.name: Breakfast
activities.notes: Early start helps with crowds and parking/taxi restrictions in Sintra.

activities.name: Travel to Rossio station
activities.notes: Arrive a bit early for tickets/platform.

activities.name: Train Lisbon → Sintra
activities.notes: Allow ~40 min plus buffer.

activities.name: Transfer to Pena Palace (bus 434 / taxi)
activities.notes: Traffic can be slow; timed entry strongly recommended.

activities.name: Pena Palace (interior + terraces)
activities.notes: Most visitors need ~2–3h including park transfers/queues—build buffer.

activities.name: Walk / transfer to Moorish Castle
activities.notes: Short transfer; expect uneven paths.

activities.name: Castelo dos Mouros (Moorish Castle)
activities.notes: Plan ~60–90 min if you do the walls.

activities.name: Lunch in Sintra town
activities.notes: Keep it efficient; queues can be long.

activities.name: Quinta da Regaleira
activities.notes: Many visitors spend ~3–4h. If you want dinner back in Lisbon, cap at ~2–2.5h and prioritize the Initiation Well + tunnels.

activities.name: Return Sintra → Lisbon
activities.notes: Leave time to reach the station, wait, and travel (~1h+ door-to-door).

activities.name: Dinner in Lisbon
activities.notes: If you prefer 18:30 dinner, either shorten Regaleira further or skip Moorish Castle.

activities.name: Vintage tram / viewpoints loop (flex morning)
activities.notes: Rick Steves-style: pick a neighborhood walk + a couple viewpoints; keep it loose.

activities.name: Belém: Jerónimos Monastery + Pastéis
activities.notes: Classic Lisbon half-day. If you hate lines, go earlier or reserve/ticket ahead.

activities.name: Chiado + Bairro Alto wandering walk
activities.notes: Best-practice ‘wander’ day: keep a single anchor sight, then let the city lead.

activities.name: Time Out Market — lunch / snack
activities.notes: Easy place to sample a bunch of things.

activities.name: Free time (shopping / nap / last Lisbon errands)
activities.notes: Buffer before wedding weekend.

activities.name: Move to Estoril (wedding weekend base)
activities.notes: Check in, drop bags, then head to the venue.

activities.name: EVOLUTION Cascais-Estoril Hotel
activities.notes: Booked hotel for wedding days.

activities.name: Haldi
activities.notes: Forte da Cruz — 18 Rua Olivença, Estoril 2765-262.

activities.name: Reset / outfit / buffer
activities.notes: Build in downtime so the evening feels easy.

activities.name: Sangeet
activities.notes: Forte da Cruz — same venue.

activities.name: Wedding Ceremony
activities.notes: Arriba — Estrada do Guincho, Cascais 2750-642.

activities.name: Break / rest
activities.notes: Back to the hotel; hydrate + reset.

activities.name: Reception
activities.notes: Arriba — same venue.

activities.name: Transit to airport
activities.notes: Allow extra buffer for weekend traffic + security.

activities.name: Fly Lisbon (LIS) → New York (JFK)
activities.notes: Return flight (TAP TP 209).
